title: Original Dolly Mixtures Retro Sweets Gift Jar By Berrymans Sweet Shop - Classic Sweets, Traditional Taste.
features: Dolly Mixtures Just How You Remember Them! Berrymans Premium Retro Sweets Are Guaranteed to Take You Back to Your Favorite Childhood Sweet Shop.
Manufactured in the UK and Filled in our Lancashire Based Traditional Sweet Factory. Each Sweet Jar is Sealed to Maintain Freshness to your Door!
Berrymans Iconic Sweets are a sure way to bring a smile to anyone's face. Our Sweet Jars are Jam Packed with the Finest Quality, Best Retro Sweets.

Our Traditional Sweets are the Perfect Gift Idea for Any Occasion: A Birthday Gift, A Small Wedding Present, Valentines Day, Mothers Day or Fathers Day, Easter, Christmas Stocking Fillers, Secret Santa, Anniversaries, Christenings, A Way of saying I’m Sorry, Thank You and More! Our Vintage Sweets make a Splendid Unique Gift.
Our Old Fashioned Sweet Jars come with Long Expiry Dates.
description: Product Description Berrymans Confectionary Berrymans Confectionary is a story of a Lancashire based family owned business which has prospered to become one of the largest suppliers of premium confectionery in the UK. The Berrymans classic sweet jar range is a perfect gift idea or present for all occasions. Modern Methods We aim to provide our customers with the most delicious traditional British sweets, Guaranteed to take you to a trip down memory lane. Classic Traditions At Berrymans we meet all the challenges of the 21st century market place but also maintain our heritage and old-fashioned tastes and traditions of the 19th and 20th centuries. Huge Range The vast range of sweets, chocolate and confectionery we offer will have something to put a smile on the faces of your friends, family & loved ones. Iconic Retro Sweets Berrymans Iconic Sweets are a sure way to bring a smile to anyone's face. Our Sweet Jars are Jam Packed with the Finest Quality, Best Retro Sweets.
